---
title: "Maggie O'Leary"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

Maggie O'Leary is an English and math double major at Colgate University. In her free time, she enjoys reading, playing the violin, and listening to classic rock.

## Education

Colgate University | Hamilton, NY
 | Aug 2025 - May 2029

---

About this site
